title: Find a document workflow
description: Run the example, inspect the source, and download the real output. Each card states what the evidence proves and where fidelity is intentionally bounded.

featured.title: Database data to a finished report
featured.description: Query SQL Server with DbaClientX, generate Excel, Word, or PDF with OfficeIMO, and publish with PSWriteOffice.

cards.image_alt: Rendered selected-direction slide from the PowerPoint design-brief example
cards.title: Design-guided presentation deck
cards.description: Generate editable slides from a brand brief, rank deterministic design alternatives, and validate the resulting Open XML package.
cards.proof: The downloadable deck is generated by the linked example and passes Open XML validation. The preview is a rendered slide from that example.
cards.limit: This proves package structure and the selected rendered slide. It does not promise pixel parity with every PowerPoint desktop version, font set, or theme.

cards.image_alt: First page of the generated OfficeIMO PDF dashboard
cards.title: Executive PDF dashboard
cards.description: Build a dependency-free PDF report with branded sections, summary metrics, tables, drawing primitives, and page-aware layout.
cards.proof: The PDF is generated by OfficeIMO.Examples. The page image is its committed Poppler visual baseline, used to catch rendering regressions.
cards.limit: Standard PDF fonts are portable but intentionally narrower than arbitrary installed-font typography and full browser layout.

cards.image_alt: Dependency-free rendered range from the generated Excel report workflow
cards.title: Operational Excel report
cards.description: Create an editable workbook with typed values, formulas, a table, chart, and pivot metadata, then inspect export readiness before delivery.
cards.proof: The XLSX and PNG come from the same runnable example. The workbook is saved even when a downstream conversion preflight blocks an unsafe claim.
cards.limit: The bundled diagnostic shows the real boundary: first-party PDF export is blocked while pivot output exists only as pivot metadata instead of materialized cells.

cards.image_alt: Dependency-free native preview of the generated premium Visio cloud architecture diagram
cards.title: Cloud architecture diagram
cards.description: Turn topology data into an editable VSDX with pages, shapes, connectors, layers, labels, and repeatable layout.
cards.proof: The VSDX is generated and structurally validated by the premium gallery. The image is the approved native-renderer baseline for the same scenario.
cards.limit: The native preview is intended for CI and review. Microsoft Visio desktop remains the authority for exact stencil and desktop-rendering parity.

cards.title: Multi-format extraction result
cards.description: Detect a document, extract normalized Markdown and hierarchical chunks, and retain source hashes, locations, capabilities, and metadata.
cards.proof: The bundled schema-versioned JSON is generated by OfficeIMO.Reader.Tool from the downloadable PowerPoint deck; the preview lists its four extracted slide headings.
cards.limit: Extraction preserves useful structure, not every visual placement. OCR and hosted providers are separate, explicitly configured capabilities.

cards.title: Offline notebook export
cards.description: Create or read a native OneNote section, package it as ONEPKG, and export the same content to HTML, Markdown, PDF, or Reader text.
cards.proof: The preview reproduces the bundled HTML export. The downloadable ONEPKG and PDF are generated from the same in-memory section.
cards.limit: The offline model targets documented structures and supported page content; it does not claim complete OneNote desktop rendering or cloud-sync behavior.
